title: Species at risk permit regional offices - Canada.ca
content:
## Species at risk permit regional offices
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
- Department of Fisheries and Oceans
- Parks Canada Agency (on the Parks Canada website)

## Environment and Climate Change Canada
If you have any doubts concerning the need for a SARA permit or if you require any additional permitting information, please contact the regional office’s permit coordinator:
Atlantic Region Permits Officer Canadian Wildlife Service Environmental Conservation Branch 17 Waterfowl Lane PO Box 6227 Sackville, New-Brunswick E4L 1G6 Tel: (506) 364-5044 Fax: (506) 364-5062 E-mail: Sarapermitting.atl@ec.gc.ca
Quebec Region SARA permit coordinator Canadian Wildlife Service Environment and Climate Change Canada 801 - 1550, d'Estimauville Avenue Québec, QC G1J 0C3 Tel: (581) 703-2687 E-mail: permislep.qc@ec.gc.ca
Ontario Region Canadian Wildlife Service Environment and Climate Change Canada 335 River Road Ottawa, ON K1V 1C7 Tel: (613) 990-8355 Fax: : (613) 990-8400 E-mail: wildlifeontario@ec.gc.ca
Prairie Region Canadian Wildlife Service Environment Climate and Change Canada Eastgate Offices, 9250 49th Street Edmonton, Alberta T6B 1K5 Tel: (780) 222-3039 Email: sarapermitpnr@ec.gc.ca
Northern Region Habitat Biologist Canadian Wildlife Service Environment and Climate Change Canada Box 1714 Qimugjuk Bldg (#969) Iqaluit, Nunavut X0A 0H0 Tel: (867) 222-1622 Fax: (867) 975-4645
E-mail: permisnordlepsarapermittingnorth@ec.gc.ca
Pacific Region Permit Section Canadian Wildlife Service Environment and Climate Change Canada 60 Front Street, L3 #104 Nanaimo, BC Tel: (250) 327-3188
E-mail: SARApermitting.PYR@ec.gc.ca

## Department of Fisheries and Oceans
SARA Permit Coordinator
200-401 Burrard Street Vancouver, BC V6C 3S4 Tel: (604) 666-7907
E-mail: DFO.PACSAR-LEPPAC.MPO@dfo-mpo.gc.ca
Central & Arctic Region (Northwest Territories, Nunavut, Alberta, Saskatchewan, Manitoba, Ontario):
SARA Permit Coordinator Canada Centre for Inland Waters 867 Lakeshore Rd. Burlington, ON L7S 1A1 Tel: 1-866-538-1609 (toll-free) E-mail: fwisar@dfo-mpo.gc.ca
Quebec Region (Quebec, St. Lawrence River, Northern Gulf of St. Lawrence):
Nicole Bouchard Institut Maurice Lamontagne 850 Route de la Mer C.P. 1000 Mont-Joli, Québec G5H 3Z4 Bus: (418) 775-0763 E-mail: Nicole.Bouchard@dfo-mpo.gc.ca
Gulf Region (southern Gulf of St. Lawrence):
Sophie Bastien-Daigle 343 Université Ave Moncton, NB E1C 9B6 Bus: (506) 851-6253
E-mail: GLF-SARA-LEP@dfo-mpo.gc.ca
Newfoundland/Labrador Region (Newfoundland, Labrador):
Helen Griffiths Northwest Atlantic Fisheries Centre East White Hills Rd P.O. Box 5667 St. John’s, NFLD A1C 5X1 Bus: (709) 772-4088
E-mail: helen.griffiths@dfo-mpo.gc.ca
Maritimes Region (New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, PEI):
Marci Penney Bedford Institute of Oceanography 1 Challenger Drive Dartmouth, NS B2Y 4A2 Bus: (902) 426-8503
E-mail: Marci.Penney@dfo-mpo.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
